## Testing

Please confirm:

- [ ] I tested the page locally.
- [ ] I tested the page on desktop.
- [ ] I tested the page on mobile.
- [ ] I checked the browser console for errors.
- [ ] I checked internal anchor links.
- [ ] I verified that RTL layout still works.
- [ ] I verified that no unnecessary dependency was added.

---

## SEO Checklist

If this change affects content or metadata:

- [ ] Page title is still valid.
- [ ] Meta description is still valid.
- [ ] Heading hierarchy is correct.
- [ ] Structured data is still valid.
- [ ] Canonical URL is correct.
- [ ] Open Graph metadata is correct.

---

## Accessibility Checklist

- [ ] Focus states are visible.
- [ ] Link text is meaningful.
- [ ] Color contrast is acceptable.
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works.
- [ ] The layout remains readable on mobile.

Add any extra context here.
